modulations.pivot_chord: IV in G = II in E minor
VII in g = I in F
VII in F = VI in E minor
iv in E minor = i in A minor
III in A minor = I in C major
IV in C = I in F
V in F = II in C major

themes.description: First theme: tonic arpeggiation in LH with chordal RH (C major), forte; triadic fanfare gesture resolving to I.
First theme continuation: running sixteenth-note passage-work in RH, sequential chromatic inflections (V/V, V/IV), cadential closure in C major.
Transition: fortspinnung texture, sequential chromaticism, Alberti-bass-like LH, leading through V7/iii (E) and back toward G major dominant preparation.
Second theme in G major: lyrical sixteenth-note melody with Alberti bass, characteristic turn figure, gentle piano dynamic, periodic phrasing.
Second theme continuation and closing variant: running passages in G major, sequential figuration, approaching structural cadence.
Closing theme (codetta): scalar descent, chromatic passing tones (bVII), confirming G major with PAC; repeat sign.
Development – modal excursion: G minor (modal mixture), sequential descent through F major, E minor, A minor; chromatic voice-leading.
Development – retransition: returns to C major area, ascending sequences through IV and V, dominant preparation for recapitulation.
Recapitulation of first theme in C major; passage-work analogous to exposition, now cadencing in C.
Recapitulation transition: analogous chromatic sequence, now redirected to remain in C major; passes through A minor / F major area.
Second theme recapitulated in C major: lyrical sixteenth-note melody with Alberti bass; extended retransition passage through F major and V7.
Second theme continuation in C major: running passage-work confirming tonic.
Closing theme in C major: scalar figures, authentic cadential confirmation; final PAC in C major.

modulations.pivot_chord: V of D / II of G
I6 of G / III of e

themes.description: Primary theme in G major; lyrical melody with Alberti-bass accompaniment, cadencing on I at bar 8 and 10
Continuation/varied repeat of primary theme; PAC in G major at bar 16
Transition/bridge passage; sequential rising bass line, modulating to confirm D major via PAC at bar 22
Secondary theme in D major; graceful melodic arpeggiation with bass, PAC in D at bar 30
Secondary theme continuation with chromatic elaboration, Neapolitan-region harmonies, and sequential passages
Closing theme (Codetta) in D major; scale and arpeggio figures confirming D major, PAC at bar 53
Development section; begins in d minor, explores modal mixture, sequences through related keys, returns via dominant pedal
Recapitulation of primary theme in G major, with variant deflecting to E minor at bar 75–82
Transition in recapitulation, passage paralleling bars 17–22 but remaining in G major
Secondary theme in G major (tonic recapitulation), PAC at bar 97
Secondary theme continuation in G major with chromatic elaboration, parallel to bars 31–44
Closing theme in G major; scale and arpeggio figures, final PAC at bar 120
